title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
posterAlt: The Mandalorian and Grogu (2026) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.
synopsis: The Mandalorian and Grogu is a 2026 action, adventure and science fiction film from United States. It carries a 6.7 rating on TMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
